# PRSG-917 — Map of Content

Navigation map for this spec. The `.process/prs.json` has a record whose `pr` is a
NON-INTEGER number (117.5) instead of an integer — a type violation the renderer
must fail safe on (exit 2), distinct from the absent/empty empty-but-valid case.
